---
title: "Southeast Asia Energy Consumption Critique"
author: "Group 2"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
---

```{r setup}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
# Additional packages can be added here

set.seed(2026)

source_file <- here("data", "energy_data.csv")
```

# Southeast Asia Energy Consumption Critique

This report documents the reproducible data workflow for the Southeast Asia energy dataset.
It includes data loading, validation, summary analysis, and visualization, following the project structure described in `CONTEXT.md`.
